_comment: 301 Redirects - Use this if you change any URL structure. Map old URLs to new ones.

redirects._example: Example redirect - remove or modify as needed

notes: CRITICAL: Keep all existing URLs exactly as they are to preserve Google rankings
If you MUST change a URL, add a 301 redirect from old to new
Trailing slashes matter - the current site uses trailing slashes
The bilingual structure uses en_ and nl_ prefixes
